requirement_topic.en: Connector Interoperability — GB/T 20234 vs IEC 62196 Type 2 / CCS2
requirement_topic.zh: 接口互操作——GB/T 20234与IEC 62196 Type 2 / CCS2
requirement_topic.zht: 接口互操作——GB/T 20234與IEC 62196 Type 2 / CCS2

summary.en: No official Mauritania EV connector mandate was confirmed from public sources as of 2026-06-14. Because Mauritania is Francophone, uses a 50 Hz IEC-style electrical environment, and is more likely to receive European or IEC-aligned vehicles than China domestic GB/T-only vehicles, IEC 62196 Type 2 for AC charging and CCS2 for DC charging are the prudent project baseline where a tender, CPO, fleet owner, or imported-vehicle supplier does not specify otherwise. IEC 62196 conformity becomes mandatory when incorporated into DNPQ standards, tender specifications, site-owner requirements, or utility / regulator project approvals.
summary.zh: 截至2026年6月14日，尚未从公开来源确认毛里塔尼亚官方电动汽车接口强制规定。由于毛里塔尼亚为法语区，采用50 Hz、偏IEC体系的电气环境，且更可能接收欧洲或IEC体系车辆而非仅支持中国GB/T的车辆，因此在招标、充电点运营商、车队业主或进口车辆供应商未另行规定时，交流IEC 62196 Type 2和直流CCS2应作为审慎的项目基线。当IEC 62196被纳入DNPQ标准、招标规格、场地方要求或公共事业/监管机构项目批准时，即成为强制要求。
summary.zht: 截至2026年6月14日，尚未從公開來源確認茅利塔尼亞官方電動汽車接口強制規定。由於茅利塔尼亞為法語區，採用50 Hz、偏IEC體系的電氣環境，且更可能接收歐洲或IEC體系車輛而非僅支持中國GB/T的車輛，因此在招標、充電點營運商、車隊業主或進口車輛供應商未另行規定時，交流IEC 62196 Type 2和直流CCS2應作為審慎的項目基線。當IEC 62196被納入DNPQ標準、招標規格、場地方要求或公共事業/監管機構項目批准時，即成為強制要求。

standards_or_laws: IEC 62196-2 — AC pin and contact-tube accessories including Type 2
IEC 62196-3 — DC and AC/DC vehicle couplers including CCS2 / configuration FF
IEC 61851-1:2017 — Electric vehicle conductive charging system — Part 1: General requirements
IEC 61851-23:2023 — Electric vehicle conductive charging system — Part 23: DC electric vehicle supply equipment
DNPQ national standards or tender adoption of IEC 62196 (verify current adoption)

summary.en: China AC chargers use GB/T 20234.2 couplers and DC fast chargers use GB/T 20234.3 couplers. GB/T 20234.2 AC couplers differ from IEC 62196 Type 2 in connector gender, contact arrangement, and signaling details, while GB/T 20234.3 DC couplers differ physically from CCS2 and use GB/T 27930 CAN communication. These connectors are not physically interchangeable with IEC 62196 Type 2 / CCS2 vehicle inlets.
summary.zh: 中国交流充电桩采用GB/T 20234.2耦合器，直流快充采用GB/T 20234.3耦合器。GB/T 20234.2交流耦合器与IEC 62196 Type 2在接口性别、触点排列和信号细节上不同；GB/T 20234.3直流耦合器与CCS2物理形状不同，并使用GB/T 27930 CAN通信。这些接口不能与IEC 62196 Type 2 / CCS2车辆接口物理互换。
summary.zht: 中國交流充電樁採用GB/T 20234.2耦合器，直流快充採用GB/T 20234.3耦合器。GB/T 20234.2交流耦合器與IEC 62196 Type 2在接口性別、觸點排列和信號細節上不同；GB/T 20234.3直流耦合器與CCS2物理形狀不同，並使用GB/T 27930 CAN通訊。這些接口不能與IEC 62196 Type 2 / CCS2車輛接口物理互換。

standards_or_laws: GB/T 20234.2-2015 — Connection set for conductive charging of electric vehicles — Part 2: AC charging coupler
GB/T 20234.3-2023 — Connection set for conductive charging of electric vehicles — Part 3: DC charging coupler
GB/T 27930-2023 — Communication protocols between off-board conductive charger and battery management system for electric vehicles
GB/T 18487.1-2023 — Electric vehicle conductive charging system — Part 1: General requirements

gap.en: A GB/T-only charger is not connector-ready for an IEC 62196 Type 2 / CCS2 Mauritania project. Conversion requires hardware change to IEC 62196 couplers, cable assemblies, locking devices, proximity and control-pilot signaling, labels, spare parts, temperature-rise evidence, and for DC charging a communication-stack change away from GB/T 27930 toward the CCS2 / IEC 61851-24 / ISO 15118 route where required. Adapters should not be treated as project-compliant connector design.
gap.zh: 仅支持GB/T的充电桩不适用于采用IEC 62196 Type 2 / CCS2的毛里塔尼亚项目。转换需要将耦合器、电缆组件、锁止装置、接近导引和控制导引信号、标签、备件、温升证据改为IEC 62196方案；对于直流充电，还须在需要时将通信栈从GB/T 27930改为CCS2 / IEC 61851-24 / ISO 15118路径。不应将转接器视为项目合规接口设计。
gap.zht: 僅支持GB/T的充電樁不適用於採用IEC 62196 Type 2 / CCS2的茅利塔尼亞項目。轉換需要將耦合器、電纜組件、鎖止裝置、接近導引和控制導引信號、標籤、備件、溫升證據改為IEC 62196方案；對於直流充電，還須在需要時將通訊棧從GB/T 27930改為CCS2 / IEC 61851-24 / ISO 15118路徑。不應將轉接器視為項目合規接口設計。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory where IEC 62196 Type 2 / CCS2 is required by DNPQ-adopted standard, tender, fleet operator, CPO, imported-vehicle supplier, ARE/SOMELEC project approval, or site specification; national connector mandate unconfirmed as of 2026-06-14
mandatory_status.cn: GB/T 20234 conformity applies to China domestic connector design and is not an IEC 62196 Type 2 / CCS2 substitute

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] For Mauritania projects, assume GB/T connector chargers need hardware redesign unless the buyer has explicitly specified a GB/T vehicle fleet. The likely IEC-aligned route is Type 2 for AC and CCS2 for DC, but the binding connector choice must be confirmed in the project documents.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 对毛里塔尼亚项目，除非买方明确指定GB/T车辆车队，否则应假定GB/T接口充电桩需要硬件重新设计。较可能的IEC体系路径是交流Type 2和直流CCS2，但具有约束力的接口选择必须在项目文件中确认。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 對茅利塔尼亞項目，除非買方明確指定GB/T車輛車隊，否則應假定GB/T接口充電樁需要硬體重新設計。較可能的IEC體系路徑是交流Type 2和直流CCS2，但具有約束力的接口選擇必須在項目文件中確認。
